STANDALONE speculative decoding uses a vanilla LLM as draft — it never reads spec_info.hidden_states architecturally. On main, the spec layer still captures, allocates, copies, and propagates hidden_states through producer / consumer / FutureMap for STANDALONE, wasting GPU memory and expo

vllm.title: [Perf] Use 2D-grid to eliminate divmod in W8W8 group quant
vllm.author: jiahanc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Replace the 1D-grid (global_group_id % padded_gpr, / padded_gpr) divmod with a 2D grid + template-constant index unpack.  Since the tile sizes are compile-time constants, the compiler can lower the coordinate math to simple bit operations instead of emitting runtime division/modulo setup.
Mi

vllm.author: mgoin

DeepGEMM's _C is a pybind11 module and emits Python-version-specific symbol references; the previous wheel only shipped the build interpreter's .so and silently failed on every other Python (#41476, #41512).

Fix potential dropped stores when wait_for_save is skipped (e.g. kv_connector_no_forward calls _get_kv_connector_output with wait_for_save=False). Moveprepare_store_kv from wait_for_save into get_finished, which always runs unconditionally in the finally block.
Partial #33689

vllm.title: [CPU] Fix rotary embedding for CPU without flash-attn ops
vllm.author: jmamou
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes CPU inference for modern models (Llama 3.x, Qwen 2.x/3.x) that use rotary embeddings by handling missing flash-attn ops module in CPU-only environments.
Problem: CPU inference crashes with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'flash_attn.ops' when loading models with rotary embeddings

vllm.title: feat(kv-events): emit KV cache metadata
vllm.author: PeaBrane
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Hybrid models can expose multiple KV cache groups whose numeric group_idx values are allocator/layout details rather than stable semantic labels. External KV-event consumers often need to know whether an event belongs to full attention, MLA, sliding-window attention, Mamba state, or anoth

vllm.title: [Model][Bugfix] Fix Step3-VL image_embeds input path
vllm.author: KaivalyaMDabhadkar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix the Step3-VL image_embeds input path, which is currently broken.
Step3VLImageEmbeddingInputs declares a required TensorSchema field named data, but _parse_and_validate_image_input() previously constructed the object with image_embeds=.... This causes TensorSchema.validate() to raise Valu

vllm.title: [CI] Migrate 6 verified jobs from gpu_1_queue to h200_18gb MIG
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Move 6 CI jobs that were validated on H200 18GB MIG (build #65789) from gpu_1_queue (L4) to device: h200_18gb
These are the jobs that passed cleanly (all shards) — the remaining ~47 jobs fail due to PyTorch's CUDACachingAllocator NVML assertion on MIG partitions
Also fixes Acceptance Length

vllm.title: platforms: add uses_cpu_device() hook to Platform for DeviceConfig
vllm.author: viktorpusTT
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Some accelerators (e.g. custom NPUs) require vLLM to leave DeviceConfig.device unset so that the host CPU handles input pre-processing, the same way TPU already works.

Platform.uses_cpu_device() defaults to self.is_tpu() so existing behaviour is unchanged; platforms that need CPU-side input

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Apply synthetic mode to probabilistic rejection sampler
vllm.author: TheEpicDolphin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Context
Per-position acceptance rates were recently added in this PR, adding support for both MRV1 and MRV2. However, MRV2 currently uses a separate path for synthetic rejection sampling, which is not ideal because synthetic acceptance rates should closely approximate actual rejection sampling.
This

Each step now annotates its artifact (image tag or wheel filename) as soon as it completes, so operators get real-time visibility into what was

Adds a short integration-notes block at the top of if(DEEPGEMM_ARCHS) in cmake/external_projects/deepgemm.cmake explaining why we build _C per-Python and listing the two

vllm.title: [KV Transfer] Add MooncakeStoreConnector for KV cache offloading via Mooncake distributed store
vllm.author: LCAIZJ
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add MooncakeStoreConnector, a new KV connector that uses MooncakeDistributedStore as a shared KV cache pool. Unlike the existing MooncakeConnector (which does direct point-to-point KV transfer between prefiller and decoder), MooncakeStoreConnector offloads KV cache to an external distributed

vllm.title: [Perf] Optimize MLA `compute_prefill_context` memory allocation
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Originally:
chunk1 -> output1
merge(output1, chunk2) -> allocate output2
merge(output2, chunk3) -> allocate output3
merge(output3, chunk4) -> allocate output4
Now
chunk1 -> outputA
merge(outputA, chunk2) -> outputB
merge(outputB, chunk3) -> outputA
merge(outputA, chunk4) -> outputB
# Only tw

vllm.title: [PD] Bump NIXL connector dependency to 1.x
vllm.author: alec-flowers
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Update the NIXL KV connector dependency from CUDA-runtime-specific bounds to the simplified NIXL meta package requirement nixl >= 1.1.0.
NIXL 1.1.0 now publishes meta-package metadata that depends on both CUDA runtime wheels and chooses the correct backend at runtime based on the torch CUDA
